summary_en: Carlit completed acquisition of 364,900 treasury shares (1.6% of outstanding) for ¥999.8M via ToSTNeT-3 on 18 May 2026, achieving the upper limit of board-authorized buyback.
title_en: Notice of Completion of Treasury Stock Acquisition via Off-Exchange Transaction (ToSTNeT-3) and Termination of Treasury Stock Acquisition Program
translation_en_brief:
Carlit Co., Ltd. (Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime, Code 4275) announced the completion of its treasury stock acquisition program on 18 May 2026. The company purchased 364,900 shares of its own common stock via ToSTNeT-3 (an off-exchange transaction method on the Tokyo Stock Exchange) for a total of approximately ¥999.8 million, executing the full amount authorized by the Board of Directors' resolution from 15 May 2026.

The buyback was undertaken as part of Carlit's medium-term business plan "Challenge2027" (fiscal 2025–2027), which emphasizes shareholder returns aligned with optimal capital structure. Management stated the repurchase aims to enhance capital efficiency through flexible and timely capital allocation. The 364,900 shares acquired represent 1.6% of outstanding shares (excluding treasury stock).

Following this acquisition, Carlit holds 457,263 treasury shares against 22,483,337 shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock). The program is now complete.
